title: Davids, Colleagues Introduce Bipartisan Bill to Boost Sustainable Aviation, Support Farmers, Grow American Jobs
content: U.S. Representative Sharice Davids (D-KS-03), alongside Representatives Mike Flood (R-NE-01), Troy Carter (D-LA-02), and Tracey Mann (R-KS-01), introduced the Securing Americaâ€™s Fuels (SAF) Act, bipartisan legislation designed to strengthen the sustainable aviation fuel (SAF) industry, create economic opportunities for farmers, and reduce emissions in the transportation sector. â€œInvesting in sustainable aviation fuel isnâ€™t just good for the environment â€” itâ€™s good for Kansas farmers, our communities, and our economy,â€ said Davids. â€œThe SAF Act ensures that clean fuel production incentives are strong and long-term so businesses, farmers, and innovators can plan for the future with confidence. The bipartisan support shows the incredible potential we have to build a healthier, stronger, and more prosperous future for generations to come.â€ â€œAmerica is on the cusp of the next great biofuels revolution,â€ said Representative Mike Flood (R-NE-01). â€œThe Securing Americaâ€™s Fuels Act is yet another way Congress can grow our bio economy and encourage innovation that creates great jobs across rural America. Sustainable aviation fuel will help lower emissions while expanding domestic markets for our nationâ€™s farmers, ensuring that our ag economy thrives for generations to come. I want to thank Congresswoman Davids for introducing this much-needed bill and look forward to working together to advance this commonsense, bipartisan bill through Congress.â€
author: Analysts Account
